channel.title: GitHub PowerShell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PowerShell in GitHub

item.title: ChrisTitusTech/winutil
item.description: Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility - Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates

item.title: SpotX-Official/SpotX
item.description: SpotX patcher used for patching the desktop version of Spotify

item.title: actions/runner-images
item.description: GitHub Actions runner images

item.title: memstechtips/UnattendedWinstall
item.description: Personalized Unattended Answer Files that helps automatically debloat and customize Windows 10 & 11 during the installation process.

item.title: ntdevlabs/tiny11builder
item.description: Scripts to build a trimmed-down Windows 11 image.

item.title: Atlas-OS/Atlas
item.description: 🚀 An open and lightweight modification to Windows, designed to optimize performance, privacy and usability.

item.title: LeDragoX/Win-Debloat-Tools
item.description: Re-imagining Windows like a minimal OS install, already debloated with minimal impact for most functionality.

item.title: Sycnex/Windows10Debloater
item.description: Script to remove Windows 10 bloatware.

item.title: Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
item.description: WAU daily updates apps as system and notify connected users. (Allowlist and Blocklist support)

item.title: meetrevision/playbook
item.description: A lightweight, stable, and performance-focused customized version of Windows that enhances privacy and compatibility

item.title: mandiant/flare-vm
item.description: A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

item.title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
item.description: A simple, easy to use PowerShell script to remove pre-installed apps from Windows, disable telemetry, remove Bing from Windows search as well as perform various other changes to declutter and improve your Windows experience. This script works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

item.title: openhab/openhab-distro
item.description: The binary distribution of openHAB

item.title: ScoopInstaller/Main
item.description: 📦 The default bucket for Scoop.

item.title: ScoopInstaller/Java
item.description: 📦 A bucket for Scoop, for Oracle Java, OpenJDK, Eclipse Temurin, IBM Semeru, Zulu, ojdkbuild, Amazon Corretto, BellSoft Liberica, SapMachine and Microsoft JDK.

item.title: PowerShellMafia/PowerSploit
item.description: PowerSploit - A PowerShell Post-Exploitation Framework

item.title: samratashok/nishang
item.description: Nishang - Offensive PowerShell for red team, penetration testing and offensive security.

item.title: dartraiden/NVIDIA-patcher
item.description: Adds 3D acceleration support for P106-090 / P106-100 / P104-100 / P104-101 / P102-100 / CMP 30HX / CMP 40HX / CMP 50HX / CMP 70HX / CMP 90HX / CMP 170HX mining cards as well as RTX 3060 3840SP and RTX 3080 Ti 20GB.

item.title: jamesstringerparsec/Easy-GPU-PV
item.description: A Project dedicated to making GPU Partitioning on Windows easier!

item.title: BetterRTX/BetterRTX-Installer
item.description: The Powershell Installer for BetterRTX!
